offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed approvals cause cash flow gaps. We streamline expense report generation and approval instead of manual spreadsheets and email approvals.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo
Participate in forums for accounting tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual entry of expenses and approval workflow
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
